nasb.text: For it is not he who commends himself that is approved, but he whom the Lord commends.

esv.text: For it is not the one who commends himself who is approved, but the one whom the Lord commends.

cnv.text: 因為蒙悅納的，不是自我推薦的人，而是主所推薦的人。

ccb.text: 因为，蒙悦纳的是主所称许的人，而不是自我称许的人。

csbs.text: 因为那经过考验的人，不是自我推荐的，而是主所推荐的。
